description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'MiNiFi-CPP verify gcc13 compatibility' that can be triggered manually. Run a single job on an ubuntu-22.04 environment with a 120-minute timeout. The job should check out the repository, install dependencies including gcc-13, build the project with cmake and make, run tests with a 300-second timeout, and upload core dumps and binaries as artifacts if the test fails and core dumps exist.
